# Fibers

# over

fun over() > bool

Returns: true if fiber is over

# cancel

fun cancel() > void

Cancel the fiber by changing its internal status to over preventing further resume or resolve

# isMain

fun isMain() > bool

Returns: true if current fiber is the main fiber
